Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign error
        Binary ??
          Ident error
          String "N/A"
      Assign threat_type
        Binary ??
          Ident threat_type
          String "N/A"
    Stage where
      Binary !=
        Ident error
        String "N/A"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident error
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident error
